test_type: Frontend - Coverage-based Intelligent PO Request Stock Screen
summary: Verified all 12 features of the new Coverage-based Intelligent PO Request Stock screen (/request/new). Key behavioral change confirmed: now shows only 4 items (those with min_qty_alert > 0 AND current_stock < min_qty_alert) instead of 173 items. Coverage period selector, stat cards, category grouping, OUT/LOW badges, source warnings, and order summary all working correctly.

tests.details: All 4 buttons visible: [3 days] [7 days] [10 days] [30 days]. 7 days selected by default (highlighted). Clicking different days works correctly.
Shows 'No consumption data — using threshold-based ordering' note next to coverage selector

tests.feature: Stat cards (Need Ordering/Partially Covered/Fully Covered/In This PO)
tests.details: Shows 167 NEED ORDERING (red border), 7 PARTIALLY COVERED (amber border), 0 FULLY COVERED, 4 IN THIS PO. Dynamic counts working.
KEY CHANGE VERIFIED: Only 4 items shown (patri, red meat, Cooking Oil, maida) - items with min_qty_alert > 0 AND current_stock < min_qty_alert. Previous version showed 173 items.
Each item shows: name, category, Your Stock with badge (patri 0 kg OUT, red meat 0 kg OUT, Cooking Oil 2 ltr, maida 0.25 kg LOW), Source Avail, editable Order Qty, Suggestion text
Shows 'non veg — 2 items' and 'veggies — 2 items' category headers
All 4 items show 'Source has only X' warning since order qty exceeds source availability (patri 100 > 64.83, red meat 500 > 128, Cooking Oil 198 > 93.82, maida 499.75 > 196.15)
Clicking 3 days, 30 days buttons works. Stat cards remain same in threshold mode (expected - no consumption data). Will change when consumption data exists.
Shows 'ORDER SUMMARY' with all 4 items: patri 100 kg, red meat 500 kg, Cooking Oil 198 ltr, maida 499.75 kg. Shows '4 items · threshold-based'
Switching to Manual Request tab shows original form with item picker dropdown (shows all catalog items with availability), quantity input, unit field, and 'Add Item' button
Shows '2 pending requests with this source' warning with amber background
Shows 'Submit Request (4 items)' button. Button is enabled when items are selected.
Order qty inputs are editable. Changed patri from 100 to 50, order summary updated to show 'patri 50 kg'. Pre-filled with gap-to-min values.

critical_code_review_comments: RequestStockForm.jsx implements intelligent filtering correctly - only shows items with min_qty_alert > 0 AND current_stock < min_qty_alert
Coverage period selector is well-implemented with clear visual feedback
Stat cards provide good overview of stock health
Source stock cross-validation provides excellent UX feedback
Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing POS API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coverage-based Intelligent PO Request Stock screen fully verified. Key change from iteration 37: now shows only 4 items (with min_qty_alert thresholds) instead of 173 items. All features working: coverage period selector (3/7/10/30 days with 7 default), no consumption data note, 4 stat cards (167 need ordering, 7 partially covered, 0 fully covered, 4 in PO), suggested items table with category grouping (non veg 2, veggies 2), OUT/LOW badges, source availability warnings, editable order qty, order summary, manual request tab, pending requests warning (2 pending), submit button with count. Consumption data is empty in preprod so threshold-based fallback is active.
